title: 秋華賞の後に・流石で、当然！

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She's gotten even stronger. If I planted a single
foot wrong, I would've lost.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Was that really my best out there? Was that
enough to prove that I'm number one—that I'd
never lose to Vodka?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You can't just answer a question with another
question! Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm still not satisfied. That's my answer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's decide on our next goal. I want to
keep this momentum going.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: How about the Queen Elizabeth II Cup?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Today, I wanted to beat you more than I wanted
to get first place.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Losin' ain't my style. So I'll see you in the next
race.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup is just around the
corner. I'll be waitin' for ya there.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And I'll go ahead and beat her in that race too!
